file.content:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

187	
188	VInv == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3 /\ VInv4
189	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

192	  /\ b > maxBal[self]

195

203	  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

207	  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)
208	
209	ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}
210	
211	LEMMA NextDef ==
212	  TypeOK => 
213	   (Next =  \E self \in Acceptor :
214	                 \E b \in Ballot : BallotAction(self, b) )
215	  PROOF OMITTED
216	
217	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
218	
219	THEOREM InductiveInvariance == VInv /\ [Next]_vars => VInv'
220	  PROOF OMITTED
221	
222	THEOREM InitImpliesInv == Init => VInv
223	  PROOF OMITTED
224	
225	THEOREM VT2 == Spec => []VInv
226	  PROOF OMITTED
227	
228	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
229	
230	C == INSTANCE Consensus 
231

233	  PROOF OMITTED

236	
237	ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)
238	
239	ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}

241	
242	AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
243	        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)
244

246	        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
247	          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x
248	
249	AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
250	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
251

253	                \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
254	                   (\A a \in Q : (maxBal[a] >= b)) => \E v \in Value : SafeAt(b,v)
255	
256	  PROOF OMITTED

260	LiveAssumption ==
261	  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
262	     \A self \in Q :
263	       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
264	       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
265	     
266	LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  
267	
268	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
269	
270	WellFounded(S, LT) == ~ \E f \in [Nat -> S] : 
271	                           \A i \in Nat : <<f[i+1], f[i]>> \in LT
272	
273	ProperSubsetRel(S) == 
274	  {r \in (SUBSET S) \X (SUBSET S) : /\ r[1] \subseteq r[2]
275	                                    /\ r[1] # r[2] }     
276	                                                     
277	THEOREM SubsetWellFounded ==
278	           \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => WellFounded(SUBSET S, ProperSubsetRel(S))
279	PROOF OMITTED
280	
281	THEOREM LatticeRule ==  ASSUME NEW S, NEW LT, WellFounded(S, LT),
282	                               NEW TEMPORAL P(_), NEW TEMPORAL Q
283	                        PROVE  /\ Q \/ (\E i \in S : P(i))
284	                               /\ \A i \in S : 
285	                                     P(i) ~> (Q \/ \E j \in S : (<<j, i>> \in LT) /\ P(j))
286	                               => ((\E i \in S : P(i)) ~> Q)
287	PROOF OMITTED
288	
289	THEOREM AlwaysForall ==
290	           ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
291	           PROVE  (\A s \in S : []P(s)) <=> [](\A s \in S : P(s))
292	  PROOF OMITTED
293	
294	LEMMA EventuallyAlwaysForall == 
295	        ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, IsFiniteSet(S),
296	               NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
297	        PROVE  (\A s \in S : <>[]P(s)) => <>[](\A s \in S : P(s))
298	
299	PROOF OMITTED
300	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
301	
302	THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
303	  PROOF OMITTED
304	
305	===============================================================================
306

file.content:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof ------------------------------ 

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
THEOREM QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

ProcSet == (Acceptor)

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM RecursiveFcnOfNat ==
          ASSUME NEW Def(_,_), 
                 \A n \in Nat : 
                    \A g, h : (\A i \in 0..(n-1) : g[i] = h[i]) => (Def(g, n) = Def(h, n))
          PROVE  LET f[n \in Nat] == Def(f, n)
                 IN  f = [n \in Nat |-> Def(f, n)]
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM SafeAtProp ==
  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
    SafeAt(b, v) =
      \/ b = 0
      \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
           /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
           /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)
                               /\ \A a \in Q :
                                    \A w \in Value :
                                        VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

THEOREM GeneralNatInduction == 
         \A f : /\ f[0]
                /\ \A n \in Nat : (\A j \in 0..n : f[j]) => f[n+1]
                => \A n \in Nat : f[n]
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA SafeLemma == 
       TypeOK => 
         \A b \in Ballot :
           \A v \in Value :
              SafeAt(b, v) => 
                \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
                  \E Q \in Quorum :
                    \A a \in Q : /\ maxBal[a] >= c
                                 /\ \/ DidNotVoteIn(a, c)
                                    \/ VotedFor(a, c, v)
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VInv1 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v, w \in Value : 
           VotedFor(a, b, v) /\ VotedFor(a, b, w) => (v = w)

VInv2 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
                  VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

VInv3 ==  \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value : 
                VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

THEOREM VInv3 => VInv1
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA VT0 == /\ TypeOK
             /\ VInv1
             /\ VInv2
             => \A v, w \in Value, b, c \in Ballot : 
                   (b > c) /\ SafeAt(b, v) /\ ChosenIn(c, w) => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM VT1 == /\ TypeOK 
               /\ VInv1
               /\ VInv2
               => \A v, w : 
                    (v \in chosen) /\ (w \in chosen) => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM SafeAtPropPrime ==
  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
    SafeAt(b, v)' =
      \/ b = 0
      \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
           /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal'[a] \geq b
           /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)'
                               /\ \A a \in Q :
                                    \A w \in Value :
                                        VotedFor(a, c, w)' => (w = v)
                /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)'
PROOF OMITTED

LEMMA VT0Prime ==
             /\ TypeOK'
             /\ VInv1'
             /\ VInv2'
             => \A v, w \in Value, b, c \in Ballot : 
                   (b > c) /\ SafeAt(b, v)' /\ ChosenIn(c, w)' => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM VT1Prime == 
               /\ TypeOK' 
               /\ VInv1'
               /\ VInv2'
               => \A v, w : 
                    (v \in chosen') /\ (w \in chosen') => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VInv4 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot : 
            maxBal[a] < b => DidNotVoteIn(a, b)

VInv == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3 /\ VInv4
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

LEMMA NextDef ==
  TypeOK => 
   (Next =  \E self \in Acceptor :
                 \E b \in Ballot : BallotAction(self, b) )
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM InductiveInvariance == VInv /\ [Next]_vars => VInv'
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM InitImpliesInv == Init => VInv
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM VT2 == Spec => []VInv
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

THEOREM VT3 == Spec => C!Spec 
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM VT4 == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3  =>
                \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
                   (\A a \in Q : (maxBal[a] >= b)) => \E v \in Value : SafeAt(b,v)

  PROOF OMITTED

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

WellFounded(S, LT) == ~ \E f \in [Nat -> S] : 
                           \A i \in Nat : <<f[i+1], f[i]>> \in LT

ProperSubsetRel(S) == 
  {r \in (SUBSET S) \X (SUBSET S) : /\ r[1] \subseteq r[2]
                                    /\ r[1] # r[2] }     
                                                     
THEOREM SubsetWellFounded ==
           \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => WellFounded(SUBSET S, ProperSubsetRel(S))
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM LatticeRule ==  ASSUME NEW S, NEW LT, WellFounded(S, LT),
                               NEW TEMPORAL P(_), NEW TEMPORAL Q
                        PROVE  /\ Q \/ (\E i \in S : P(i))
                               /\ \A i \in S : 
                                     P(i) ~> (Q \/ \E j \in S : (<<j, i>> \in LT) /\ P(j))
                               => ((\E i \in S : P(i)) ~> Q)
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM AlwaysForall ==
           ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
           PROVE  (\A s \in S : []P(s)) <=> [](\A s \in S : P(s))
  PROOF OMITTED

LEMMA EventuallyAlwaysForall == 
        ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, IsFiniteSet(S),
               NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
        PROVE  (\A s \in S : <>[]P(s)) => <>[](\A s \in S : P(s))

PROOF OMITTED
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OMITTED

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE Consensus ------------------------------ 

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLAPS

CONSTANT Value  

VARIABLE chosen

vars == << chosen >>

Init == 
        /\ chosen = {}

Next == /\ chosen = {}
        /\ \E v \in Value:
             chosen' = {v}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

TypeOK == /\ chosen \subseteq Value
          /\ IsFiniteSet(chosen) 

Inv == /\ TypeOK
       /\ Cardinality(chosen) \leq 1

AXIOM EmptySetCardinality == IsFiniteSet({}) /\ Cardinality({}) = 0
AXIOM SingletonCardinality == 
          \A e : IsFiniteSet({e}) /\ (Cardinality({e}) = 1)

SingleCardinalityTest == 
  \A e \in SUBSET {"a", "b", "c"} : IsFiniteSet({e}) /\ (Cardinality({e}) = 1)

LEMMA InductiveInvariance ==
           Inv /\ [Next]_vars => Inv'
  PROOF OMITTED

LiveSpec == Spec /\ WF_vars(Next)
Success == <>(chosen # {})

        TypeOK => 
          ((ENABLED <<Next>>_vars) <=> (chosen = {}))

  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM LiveSpecEquals ==
          LiveSpec <=> Spec /\ ([]<><<Next>>_vars \/ []<>(chosen # {}))
  PROOF OMITTED

1	---------------------------- MODULE PConProof -------------------------------
2	
3	EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS
4	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
5	
6	CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum
7	
8	ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
9	             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {} 
10	                                                                     
11	Ballot ==  Nat
12	
13	ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap Acceptor = {}
14	
15	None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value
16	
17	Message ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballot]
18	           \cup [type : {"1b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, 
19	                 mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None}]
20	           \cup [type : {"1c"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
21	           \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
22	           \cup [type : {"2b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
23	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
24	
25	VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs
26	
27	sentMsgs(t, b) == {m \in msgs : (m.type = t) /\ (m.bal = b)}
28	
29	ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
30	  LET Q1b == {m \in sentMsgs("1b", b) : m.acc \in Q}
31	  IN  /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in Q1b : m.acc = a
32	      /\ \/ \A m \in Q1b : m.mbal = -1
33	         \/ \E m1c \in msgs :
34	              /\ m1c = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> m1c.bal, val |-> v]
35	              /\ \A m \in Q1b : /\ m1c.bal \geq m.mbal
36	                                /\ (m1c.bal = m.mbal) => (m.mval = v)
37	
38	vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs >>
39	
40	ProcSet == (Acceptor) \cup (Ballot)
41	
42	Init == 
43	        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
44	        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
45	        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
46	        /\ msgs = {}
47	
48	acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
49	                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
50	                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
51	                       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
52	                                               mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
53	                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>
54	                    \/ /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
55	                       /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
56	                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
57	                            /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
58	                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
59	                            /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
60	                                                       bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})
61	
62	leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
63	                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET Value:
64	                           /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
65	                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
66	                   \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
67	                           /\ /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
68	                              /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
69	                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
70	                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
71	
72	Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
73	           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))
74	
75	Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
76	
77	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
78	
79	Phase1a(self) ==
80	  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
81	  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
82	
83	Phase1c(self, S) ==
84	  /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
85	  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
86	  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
87	
88	Phase2a(self, v) ==
89	  /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
90	  /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
91	  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
92	  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>
93	
94	Phase1b(self, b) ==
95	  /\ b > maxBal[self]
96	  /\ sentMsgs("1a", b) # {}
97	  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
98	  /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
99	                         mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]}
100	  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>
101	
102	Phase2b(self, b) ==
103	  /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
104	  /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
105	       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
106	       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
107	       /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
108	       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
109	                               bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})
110	
111	TLANext ==
112	  \/ \E self \in Acceptor : 
113	        \E b \in Ballot : \/ Phase1b(self, b) 
114	                          \/ Phase2b(self,b) 
115	  \/ \E self \in Ballot :
116	        \/ Phase1a(self)
117	        \/ \E S \in SUBSET Value : Phase1c(self, S)
118	        \/ \E v \in Value : Phase2a(self, v)
119	
120	THEOREM NextDef == (Next <=> TLANext) 
121	  PROOF OMITTED
122	
123	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
124	
125	TypeOK == /\ maxBal  \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
126	          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
127	          /\ maxVVal \in [Acceptor -> Value \cup {None}]
128	          /\ msgs \subseteq Message    
129	
130	chosen == {v \in Value : \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
131	                           \A a \in Q : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
132	                                                        /\ m.acc  = a
133	                                                        /\ m.bal  = b
134	                                                        /\ m.val  = v} 
135	----------------------------------------------------------------------------
136	
137	votes == [a \in Acceptor |->  
138	           {<<m.bal, m.val>> : m \in {mm \in msgs: /\ mm.type = "2b"
139	                                                   /\ mm.acc = a }}]
140	
141	V == INSTANCE VoteProof 
142	
143	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
144	
145	PAccInv == \A a \in Acceptor : 
146	             /\ maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]
147	             /\ \A b \in (maxVBal[a]+1)..(maxBal[a]-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(a,b)
148	             /\ (maxVBal[a] # -1) => V!VotedFor(a, maxVBal[a], maxVVal[a])
149	             
150	P1bInv == \A m \in msgs :
151	             (m.type = "1b") => 
152	               /\ (maxBal[m.acc] >= m.bal) /\ (m.bal > m.mbal)
153	               /\ \A b \in (m.mbal+1)..(m.bal-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(m.acc,b)
154	
155	P1cInv ==  \A m \in msgs : (m.type = "1c") => V!SafeAt(m.bal, m.val)
156	
157	P2aInv == \A m \in msgs : 
158	            (m.type = "2a") => \E m1c \in msgs : /\ m1c.type = "1c"
159	                                                 /\ m1c.bal = m.bal 
160	                                                 /\ m1c.val = m.val
161	
162	THEOREM PT1 == TypeOK /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv =>
163	                 \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
164	                     ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) => V!SafeAt(b, v) 
165	  PROOF OMITTED
166	
167	PInv == TypeOK /\ PAccInv /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv /\ P2aInv  
168	
169	THEOREM Invariance == Spec => []PInv
170	  PROOF OMITTED
171	
172	THEOREM Implementation == Spec => V!Spec
173	  PROOF OMITTED
174	
175	THEOREM Spec => [](chosen = V!chosen)
176	  PROOF OMITTED
177	
178	=============================================================================
179	
180

file.content:
---------------------------- MODULE PConProof -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor 
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {} 
                                                                     
Ballot ==  Nat

ASSUME BallotAssump == (Ballot \cup {-1}) \cap Acceptor = {}

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Value

Message ==      [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballot]
           \cup [type : {"1b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, 
                 mbal : Ballot \cup {-1}, mval : Value \cup {None}]
           \cup [type : {"1c"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
           \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
           \cup [type : {"2b"}, acc : Acceptor, bal : Ballot, val : Value]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs

sentMsgs(t, b) == {m \in msgs : (m.type = t) /\ (m.bal = b)}

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  LET Q1b == {m \in sentMsgs("1b", b) : m.acc \in Q}
  IN  /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in Q1b : m.acc = a
      /\ \/ \A m \in Q1b : m.mbal = -1
         \/ \E m1c \in msgs :
              /\ m1c = [type |-> "1c", bal |-> m1c.bal, val |-> v]
              /\ \A m \in Q1b : /\ m1c.bal \geq m.mbal
                                /\ (m1c.bal = m.mbal) => (m.mval = v)

vars == << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal, msgs >>

ProcSet == (Acceptor) \cup (Ballot)

Init == 
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
        /\ msgs = {}

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ (b > maxBal[self]) /\ (sentMsgs("1a", b) # {})
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
                                               mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]})
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>
                    \/ /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
                       /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                            /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                            /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
                            /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
                                                       bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})

leader(self) == /\ \/ /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
                   \/ /\ \E S \in SUBSET Value:
                           /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
                   \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                           /\ /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
                              /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
                           /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
                /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
           \/ (\E self \in Ballot: leader(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Phase1a(self) ==
  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> self]})
  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Phase1c(self, S) ==
  /\ \A v \in S : \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, self, v)
  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] : v \in S})
  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Phase2a(self, v) ==
  /\ sentMsgs("2a", self) = {}
  /\ [type |-> "1c", bal |-> self, val |-> v] \in msgs
  /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2a", bal |-> self, val |-> v]})
  /\ UNCHANGED << maxBal, maxVBal, maxVVal >>

Phase1b(self, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ sentMsgs("1a", b) # {}
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1b", acc |-> self, bal |-> b,
                         mbal |-> maxVBal[self], mval |-> maxVVal[self]]}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVVal>>

Phase2b(self, b) ==
  /\ b \geq maxBal[self]
  /\ \E m \in sentMsgs("2a", b):
       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
       /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
       /\ maxVVal' = [maxVVal EXCEPT ![self] = m.val]
       /\ msgs' = (msgs \cup {[type |-> "2b", acc |-> self,
                               bal |-> b, val |-> m.val]})

TLANext ==
  \/ \E self \in Acceptor : 
        \E b \in Ballot : \/ Phase1b(self, b) 
                          \/ Phase2b(self,b) 
  \/ \E self \in Ballot :
        \/ Phase1a(self)
        \/ \E S \in SUBSET Value : Phase1c(self, S)
        \/ \E v \in Value : Phase2a(self, v)

THEOREM NextDef == (Next <=> TLANext) 
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

TypeOK == /\ maxBal  \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVVal \in [Acceptor -> Value \cup {None}]
          /\ msgs \subseteq Message    

chosen == {v \in Value : \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
                           \A a \in Q : \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                                        /\ m.acc  = a
                                                        /\ m.bal  = b
                                                        /\ m.val  = v} 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

votes == [a \in Acceptor |->  
           {<<m.bal, m.val>> : m \in {mm \in msgs: /\ mm.type = "2b"
                                                   /\ mm.acc = a }}]

V == INSTANCE VoteProof 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

PAccInv == \A a \in Acceptor : 
             /\ maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]
             /\ \A b \in (maxVBal[a]+1)..(maxBal[a]-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(a,b)
             /\ (maxVBal[a] # -1) => V!VotedFor(a, maxVBal[a], maxVVal[a])
             
P1bInv == \A m \in msgs :
             (m.type = "1b") => 
               /\ (maxBal[m.acc] >= m.bal) /\ (m.bal > m.mbal)
               /\ \A b \in (m.mbal+1)..(m.bal-1) : V!DidNotVoteIn(m.acc,b)

P1cInv ==  \A m \in msgs : (m.type = "1c") => V!SafeAt(m.bal, m.val)

P2aInv == \A m \in msgs : 
            (m.type = "2a") => \E m1c \in msgs : /\ m1c.type = "1c"
                                                 /\ m1c.bal = m.bal 
                                                 /\ m1c.val = m.val

THEOREM PT1 == TypeOK /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv =>
                 \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
                     ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) => V!SafeAt(b, v) 
  PROOF OMITTED

PInv == TypeOK /\ PAccInv /\ P1bInv /\ P1cInv /\ P2aInv  

THEOREM Invariance == Spec => []PInv
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM Implementation == Spec => V!Spec
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM Spec => [](chosen = V!chosen)
  PROOF OMITTED

=============================================================================

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF BY VP!Liveness DEF LiveSpec, Spec, Init, Next, vars, LiveAssumption, BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VoteFor,
                          VP!LiveSpec, VP!Spec, VP!Init, VP!Next, VP!vars, VP!LiveAssumption, VP!BallotAction, VP!IncreaseMaxBal, VP!VoteFor,
                          C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, C!Init, C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!LiveSpec, VP!C!Spec, VP!C!Init, VP!C!Next, VP!C!vars
tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

lines: +PROOF BY VP!Liveness DEF LiveSpec, Spec, Init, Next, vars, LiveAssumption, BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VoteFor,
+                          VP!LiveSpec, VP!Spec, VP!Init, VP!Next, VP!vars, VP!LiveAssumption, VP!BallotAction, VP!IncreaseMaxBal, VP!VoteFor,
+                          C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, C!Init, C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!LiveSpec, VP!C!Spec, VP!C!Init, VP!C!Next, VP!C!vars

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF BY VP!Liveness DEF LiveSpec, Spec, Init, Next, vars, LiveAssumption, BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VoteFor,
                          VP!LiveSpec, VP!Spec, VP!Init, VP!Next, VP!vars, VP!LiveAssumption, VP!BallotAction, VP!IncreaseMaxBal, VP!VoteFor,
                          C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, C!Init, C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!LiveSpec, VP!C!Spec, VP!C!Init, VP!C!Next, VP!C!vars

===============================================================================

lines: -PROOF BY VP!Liveness DEF LiveSpec, Spec, Init, Next, vars, LiveAssumption, BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VoteFor,
-                          VP!LiveSpec, VP!Spec, VP!Init, VP!Next, VP!vars, VP!LiveAssumption, VP!BallotAction, VP!IncreaseMaxBal, VP!VoteFor,
-                          C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, C!Init, C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!LiveSpec, VP!C!Spec, VP!C!Init, VP!C!Next, VP!C!vars

                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF BY VP!Liveness

===============================================================================

+         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
+  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
+         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA LiveSpecEqual == LiveSpec = VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA CLiveSpecEqual == C!LiveSpec = VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF BY VP!Liveness, LiveSpecEqual, CLiveSpecEqual

===============================================================================

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA LiveSpecEqual == LiveSpec = VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA CLiveSpecEqual == C!LiveSpec = VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
<1>1. VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec  BY VP!Liveness
<1>2. LiveSpec = VP!LiveSpec  BY LiveSpecEqual
<1>3. C!LiveSpec = VP!C!LiveSpec  BY CLiveSpecEqual
<1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3

===============================================================================

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

CONSTANT Value,

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==

        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA LiveSpecEqual == LiveSpec = VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA CLiveSpecEqual == C!LiveSpec = VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot

LEMMA UseVPLiveness == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY VP!Liveness

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF BY UseVPLiveness, LiveSpecEqual, CLiveSpecEqual

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA LiveSpecEqual == LiveSpec = VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA CLiveSpecEqual == C!LiveSpec = VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot

LEMMA UseVPLiveness == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF BY UseVPLiveness, LiveSpecEqual, CLiveSpecEqual
