tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA LiveSpecEqual == LiveSpec = VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA CLiveSpecEqual == C!LiveSpec = VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot

LEMMA UseVPLiveness == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
<1>1. ASSUME VP!LiveSpec
      PROVE VP!C!LiveSpec
      BY <1>1, VP!Liveness
<1> QED  BY <1>1

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF BY UseVPLiveness, LiveSpecEqual, CLiveSpecEqual

===============================================================================

Ballot == Nat

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==

        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA LiveSpecEqual == LiveSpec = VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,

  BY VP!QuorumNonEmpty

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA LiveSpecEqual == LiveSpec = VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA CLiveSpecEqual == C!LiveSpec = VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot

USE VP!QuorumNonEmpty

LEMMA TestVP1 == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  OBVIOUS

LEMMA UseVPLiveness == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY VP!Liveness

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF BY UseVPLiveness, LiveSpecEqual, CLiveSpecEqual

===============================================================================

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof WITH Value <- Value, Acceptor <- Acceptor, Quorum <- Quorum, votes <- votes, maxBal <- maxBal

LEMMA TestVP1 == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY VP!QuorumNonEmpty

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty
   DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
       Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA TestLemma == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY VP!Liveness PTL

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  BY VP!Liveness
  DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
      Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
      BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
      VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
      VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
      SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor,
      C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
      C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
      chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn

===============================================================================

-      Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
-      C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqInit == Init = VP!Init  BY DEF Init, VP!Init
LEMMA EqNext == Next = VP!Next
  BY DEF Next, VP!Next, acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt
LEMMA EqVars == vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
LEMMA EqSpec == Spec = VP!Spec  BY EqInit, EqNext, EqVars DEF Spec, VP!Spec

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

-  BY DEF Next, VP!Next, acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
-         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt
+LEMMA EqInit == Init <=> VP!Init  BY DEF Init, VP!Init
LEMMA EqVars == vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars

  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqInit == Init <=> VP!Init  BY DEF Init, VP!Init
LEMMA EqNextStep == [Next]_vars <=> [VP!Next]_VP!vars
  BY DEF Next, VP!Next, acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt,
         vars, VP!vars

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

input.new_string:
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqInit == Init <=> VP!Init  BY DEF Init, VP!Init

LEMMA EqNextStep == [Next]_vars <=> [VP!Next]_VP!vars
  BY DEF Next, VP!Next, acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt,
         vars, VP!vars

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  <1>1. Init <=> VP!Init  BY EqInit
  <1>2. [][Next]_vars <=> [][VP!Next]_VP!vars  BY EqNextStep, PTL
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Spec, VP!Spec

LEMMA EqBallotAction == \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)
  BY DEF BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqWFBA == \A self, b : WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b)) <=> WF_VP!vars(VP!BallotAction(self, b))
  <1>1. vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
  <1>2. \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL

LEMMA EqBoxBA == \A self, b : ([] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars)
                              <=> ([] [\A c \in VP!Ballot : (c > b) => ~ VP!BallotAction(self, c)]_VP!vars)
  <1>1. vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
  <1>2. Ballot = VP!Ballot  BY DEF Ballot, VP!Ballot
  <1>3. \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA EqLiveAssumption == LiveAssumption <=> VP!LiveAssumption
  <1>1. \A self, b : (/\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
                      /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars)
                  <=> (/\ WF_VP!vars(VP!BallotAction(self, b))
                       /\ [] [\A c \in VP!Ballot : (c > b) => ~ VP!BallotAction(self, c)]_VP!vars)
       BY EqWFBA, EqBoxBA
  <1>2. Ballot = VP!Ballot  BY DEF Ballot, VP!Ballot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY EqSpec, EqLiveAssumption DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec

LEMMA EqCInit == C!Init <=> VP!C!Init
  BY DEF C!Init, VP!C!Init, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqCNextStep == [C!Next]_C!vars <=> [VP!C!Next]_VP!C!vars
  BY DEF C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  <1>1. C!Init <=> VP!C!Init  BY EqCInit
  <1>2. [][C!Next]_C!vars <=> [][VP!C!Next]_VP!C!vars  BY EqCNextStep, PTL
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec

LEMMA EqCWF == WF_C!vars(C!Next) <=> WF_VP!C!vars(VP!C!Next)
  <1>1. C!Next <=> VP!C!Next
        BY DEF C!Next, VP!C!Next, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
               Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor
  <1>2. C!vars = VP!C!vars
        BY DEF C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
               Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY EqCSpec, EqCWF DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  <1>1. VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec  BY VP!Liveness
  <1>2. LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec  BY EqLiveSpec
  <1>3. C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec  BY EqCLiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqInit == Init <=> VP!Init  BY DEF Init, VP!Init
LEMMA EqNextStep == [Next]_vars <=> [VP!Next]_VP!vars
  BY DEF Next, VP!Next, acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt,
         vars, VP!vars
LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  <1>1. Init <=> VP!Init  BY EqInit
  <1>2. [][Next]_vars <=> [][VP!Next]_VP!vars  BY EqNextStep, PTL
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Spec, VP!Spec

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

BY DEF Next, VP!Next, acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt,
+LEMMA EqBallotAction == \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)

+  <1>2. \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
+LEMMA EqBoxBA == \A self, b : ([] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars)
+  <1>1. vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
+  <1>2. Ballot = VP!Ballot  BY DEF Ballot, VP!Ballot

+  <1>2. Ballot = VP!Ballot  BY DEF Ballot, VP!Ballot
+  BY EqSpec, EqLiveAssumption DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec
+  BY DEF C!Init, VP!C!Init, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
+  BY DEF C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
+        BY DEF C!Next, VP!C!Next, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
+        BY DEF C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
+  BY EqCSpec, EqCWF DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec

file.content:
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqInit == Init <=> VP!Init  BY DEF Init, VP!Init

LEMMA EqNextStep == [Next]_vars <=> [VP!Next]_VP!vars
  BY DEF Next, VP!Next, acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt,
         vars, VP!vars

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  <1>1. Init <=> VP!Init  BY EqInit
  <1>2. [][Next]_vars <=> [][VP!Next]_VP!vars  BY EqNextStep, PTL
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Spec, VP!Spec

LEMMA EqBallotAction == \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)
  BY DEF BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqWFBA == \A self, b : WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b)) <=> WF_VP!vars(VP!BallotAction(self, b))
  <1>1. vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
  <1>2. \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL

LEMMA EqBoxBA == \A self, b : ([] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars)
                              <=> ([] [\A c \in VP!Ballot : (c > b) => ~ VP!BallotAction(self, c)]_VP!vars)
  <1>1. vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
  <1>2. Ballot = VP!Ballot  BY DEF Ballot, VP!Ballot
  <1>3. \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA EqLiveAssumption == LiveAssumption <=> VP!LiveAssumption
  <1>1. \A self, b : (/\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
                      /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars)
                  <=> (/\ WF_VP!vars(VP!BallotAction(self, b))
                       /\ [] [\A c \in VP!Ballot : (c > b) => ~ VP!BallotAction(self, c)]_VP!vars)
       BY EqWFBA, EqBoxBA
  <1>2. Ballot = VP!Ballot  BY DEF Ballot, VP!Ballot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY EqSpec, EqLiveAssumption DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec

LEMMA EqCInit == C!Init <=> VP!C!Init
  BY DEF C!Init, VP!C!Init, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqCNextStep == [C!Next]_C!vars <=> [VP!C!Next]_VP!C!vars
  BY DEF C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  <1>1. C!Init <=> VP!C!Init  BY EqCInit
  <1>2. [][C!Next]_C!vars <=> [][VP!C!Next]_VP!C!vars  BY EqCNextStep, PTL
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec

LEMMA EqCWF == WF_C!vars(C!Next) <=> WF_VP!C!vars(VP!C!Next)
  <1>1. C!Next <=> VP!C!Next
        BY DEF C!Next, VP!C!Next, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
               Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor
  <1>2. C!vars = VP!C!vars
        BY DEF C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
               Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY EqCSpec, EqCWF DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  <1>1. VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec  BY VP!Liveness
  <1>2. LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec  BY EqLiveSpec
  <1>3. C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec  BY EqCLiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

===============================================================================

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqInit == Init <=> VP!Init  BY DEF Init, VP!Init

LEMMA EqNextStep == [Next]_vars <=> [VP!Next]_VP!vars
  BY DEF Next, VP!Next, acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt,
         vars, VP!vars

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  <1>1. Init <=> VP!Init  BY EqInit
  <1>2. [][Next]_vars <=> [][VP!Next]_VP!vars  BY EqNextStep, PTL
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Spec, VP!Spec

LEMMA EqBallotAction == \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)
  BY DEF BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqWFBA == \A self, b : WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b)) <=> WF_VP!vars(VP!BallotAction(self, b))
  <1>1. vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
  <1>2. \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL

LEMMA EqBoxBA == \A self, b : ([] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars)
                              <=> ([] [\A c \in VP!Ballot : (c > b) => ~ VP!BallotAction(self, c)]_VP!vars)
  <1>1. vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
  <1>2. Ballot = VP!Ballot  BY DEF Ballot, VP!Ballot
  <1>3. \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA EqLiveAssumption == LiveAssumption <=> VP!LiveAssumption
  <1>1. \A self, b : (/\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
                      /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars)
                  <=> (/\ WF_VP!vars(VP!BallotAction(self, b))
                       /\ [] [\A c \in VP!Ballot : (c > b) => ~ VP!BallotAction(self, c)]_VP!vars)
       BY EqWFBA, EqBoxBA
  <1>2. Ballot = VP!Ballot  BY DEF Ballot, VP!Ballot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY EqSpec, EqLiveAssumption DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec

LEMMA EqCInit == C!Init <=> VP!C!Init
  BY DEF C!Init, VP!C!Init, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqCNextStep == [C!Next]_C!vars <=> [VP!C!Next]_VP!C!vars
  BY DEF C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  <1>1. C!Init <=> VP!C!Init  BY EqCInit
  <1>2. [][C!Next]_C!vars <=> [][VP!C!Next]_VP!C!vars  BY EqCNextStep, PTL
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec

LEMMA EqCWF == WF_C!vars(C!Next) <=> WF_VP!C!vars(VP!C!Next)
  <1>1. C!Next <=> VP!C!Next
        BY DEF C!Next, VP!C!Next, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
               Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor
  <1>2. C!vars = VP!C!vars
        BY DEF C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
               Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY EqCSpec, EqCWF DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  <1>1. VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec  BY VP!Liveness
  <1>2. LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec  BY EqLiveSpec
  <1>3. C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec  BY EqCLiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

===============================================================================

+  BY DEF SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
LEMMA EqBallotAction == \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)
-  BY DEF BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
LEMMA EqWFBA == \A self, b : WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b)) <=> WF_VP!vars(VP!BallotAction(self, b))

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqInit == Init <=> VP!Init  BY DEF Init, VP!Init

LEMMA EqNextStep == [Next]_vars <=> [VP!Next]_VP!vars
  BY DEF Next, VP!Next, acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt,
         vars, VP!vars

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  <1>1. Init <=> VP!Init  BY EqInit
  <1>2. [][Next]_vars <=> [][VP!Next]_VP!vars  BY EqNextStep, PTL
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Spec, VP!Spec

LEMMA EqSafeAt == \A b, v : SafeAt(b, v) <=> VP!SafeAt(b, v)
  BY DEF SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot

LEMMA EqBallotAction == \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)
  BY EqSafeAt
  DEF BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
      VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
      VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqWFBA == \A self, b : WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b)) <=> WF_VP!vars(VP!BallotAction(self, b))
  <1>1. vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
  <1>2. \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL

LEMMA EqBoxBA == \A self, b : ([] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars)
                              <=> ([] [\A c \in VP!Ballot : (c > b) => ~ VP!BallotAction(self, c)]_VP!vars)
  <1>1. vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
  <1>2. Ballot = VP!Ballot  BY DEF Ballot, VP!Ballot
  <1>3. \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA EqLiveAssumption == LiveAssumption <=> VP!LiveAssumption
  <1>1. \A self, b : (/\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
                      /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars)
                  <=> (/\ WF_VP!vars(VP!BallotAction(self, b))
                       /\ [] [\A c \in VP!Ballot : (c > b) => ~ VP!BallotAction(self, c)]_VP!vars)
       BY EqWFBA, EqBoxBA
  <1>2. Ballot = VP!Ballot  BY DEF Ballot, VP!Ballot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY EqSpec, EqLiveAssumption DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec

LEMMA EqCInit == C!Init <=> VP!C!Init
  BY DEF C!Init, VP!C!Init, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqCNextStep == [C!Next]_C!vars <=> [VP!C!Next]_VP!C!vars
  BY DEF C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  <1>1. C!Init <=> VP!C!Init  BY EqCInit
  <1>2. [][C!Next]_C!vars <=> [][VP!C!Next]_VP!C!vars  BY EqCNextStep, PTL
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec

LEMMA EqCWF == WF_C!vars(C!Next) <=> WF_VP!C!vars(VP!C!Next)
  <1>1. C!Next <=> VP!C!Next
        BY DEF C!Next, VP!C!Next, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
               Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor
  <1>2. C!vars = VP!C!vars
        BY DEF C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
               Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY EqCSpec, EqCWF DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  <1>1. VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec  BY VP!Liveness
  <1>2. LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec  BY EqLiveSpec
  <1>3. C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec  BY EqCLiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

===============================================================================

lines: -LEMMA EqWFBA == \A self, b : WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b)) <=> WF_VP!vars(VP!BallotAction(self, b))
+LEMMA EqWFBA == ASSUME NEW self, NEW b
<1>1. vars = VP!vars  BY DEF vars, VP!vars
-  <1>2. \A self, b : BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
+  <1>2. BallotAction(self, b) <=> VP!BallotAction(self, b)  BY EqBallotAction
LEMMA EqBoxBA == \A self, b : ([] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars)

content.text: Let me check the TLAPS documentation for handling WF substitution.

content.content:
P /\ <<N /\ A>>_f => Q',
                          P => ENABLED <<A>>_f
                   PROVE  [][N]_f /\ WF_f(A) => (P ~> Q)

THEOREM RuleSF1 == ASSUME STATE P, STATE Q, STATE f,
                          ACTION N, ACTION A, TEMPORAL F,
                          P /\ [N]_f => (P' \/ Q'),
                          P /\ <<N /\ A>>_f => Q',
                          []P /\ [][N]_f /\ []F => <> ENABLED <<A>>_f
                   PROVE  [][N]_f /\ SF_f(A) /\ []F => (P ~> Q)

(***************************************************************************)
(* The rules WF2 and SF2 in "The Temporal Logic of Actions" are obtained   *)
(* from the following two rules by the following substitutions: `.         *)
(*                                                                         *)
(*          ___        ___         _______________                         *)
(*      M <- M ,   g <- g ,  EM <- ENABLED <<M>>_g       .'                *)
(***************************************************************************)
THEOREM RuleWF2 == ASSUME STATE P, STATE f, STATE g, STATE EM,
                          ACTION A, ACTION B, ACTION N, ACTION M,
                          TEMPORAL F,
                          <<N /\ B>>_f => <<M>>_g,
                          P /\ P' /\ <<N /\ A>>_f /\ EM => B,
                          P /\ EM => ENABLED A,
                          [][N /\ ~B]_f /\ WF_f(A) /\ []F /\ <>[]EM => <>[]P
                   PROVE  [][N]_f /\ WF_f(A) /\ []F => []<><<M>>_g \/ []<>(~EM)

THEOREM RuleSF2 == ASSUME STATE P, STATE f, STATE g, STATE EM,
                          ACTION A, ACTION B, ACTION N, ACTION M,
                          TEMPORAL F,
                          <<N /\ B>>_f => <<M>>_g,
                          P /\ P' /\ <<N /\ A>>_f /\ EM => B,
                          P /\ EM => ENABLED A,
                          [][N /\ ~B]_f /\ SF_f(A) /\ []F /\ []<>EM => <>[]P
                   PROVE  [][N]_f /\ SF_f(A) /\ []F => []<><<M>>_g \/ <>[](~EM)
