tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA TestVT3 == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

LEMMA TestLive == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  PROOF
    <1>1. (VP!Spec /\ VP!LiveAssumption) => VP!C!LiveSpec
       BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
          SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite
    <1> QED  BY <1>1 DEF VP!LiveSpec

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

lines: BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
-       BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
\* The actual theorem we want to prove

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

\* VP!VT3 is Spec => C!Spec
LEMMA TestVT3 == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

+  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
+         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  <1>1. VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
    BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
       SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite
  <1>2. LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec  BY EqLiveSpec
  <1>3. C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec  BY EqCLiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

===============================================================================

        \/ bb = 0

             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb

                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]

                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:

                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)

                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) ==

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_min == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty

LEMMA TestLive_full == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
USE QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
    SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

LEMMA TestLive_full == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY VP!Liveness

\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

lines: \* The actual theorem we want to prove
+    <2>2. VP!C!LiveSpec  BY <2>1, VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

LEMMA TestAF == ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
                PROVE (\A s \in S : []P(s)) <=> [](\A s \in S : P(s))
  BY VP!AlwaysForall, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

lines: +  BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
+     VP!SafeAtProp, VP!SafeLemma, VP!VT0, VP!VT1, VP!SafeAtPropPrime, VP!VT0Prime, VP!VT1Prime,
+     VP!NextDef, VP!InductiveInvariance, VP!InitImpliesInv, VP!VT2, VP!VT3, VP!VT4,
\* The actual theorem we want to prove

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

\* Try variant of VP!Liveness
LEMMA TryLive == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite,
     VP!QuorumNonEmpty, VP!RecursiveFcnOfNat, VP!GeneralNatInduction,
     VP!SafeAtProp, VP!SafeLemma, VP!VT0, VP!VT1, VP!SafeAtPropPrime, VP!VT0Prime, VP!VT1Prime,
     VP!NextDef, VP!InductiveInvariance, VP!InitImpliesInv, VP!VT2, VP!VT3, VP!VT4,
     VP!SubsetWellFounded, VP!LatticeRule, VP!AlwaysForall, VP!EventuallyAlwaysForall

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,

         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec

         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world

  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

                     (\A a \in Q : maxBal[a] >= b) => \E v \in Value : VP!SafeAt(b, v)
  BY VP!VT4, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
