tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

LEMMA TestVT4 == VP!TypeOK /\ VP!VInv2 /\ VP!VInv3 =>
                  \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
                    (\A a \in Q : maxBal[a] >= b) => \E v \in Value : VP!SafeAt(b, v)
  BY VP!VT4, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

lines: (\A a \in Q : maxBal[a] >= b) => \E v \in Value : VP!SafeAt(b, v)
BY VP!VT4, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

  PROOF OBVIOUS

                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :

LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,

         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,

         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,

  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec

  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

filename = '/tmp/claude-1000/claude_code_bench_VoteProof_Liveness_zqhdy_sc/check_proof_bin'
with open(filename, 'rb') as f:
    data = f.read()

# PyInstaller magic at end: MAGIC_STRING + cookie
# Find the start of the CArchive
# Cookie: 24 bytes: magic(8) + len(4) + tocs(4) + cookie_offset(4) + py_libname(64)
import re

# Look for the cookie at the end
COOKIE_MAGIC = b'MEI\014\013\012\013\016'
idx = data.rfind(COOKIE_MAGIC)
print(f'Cookie at {idx}')

if idx > 0:
    cookie_data = data[idx:idx+88]
    # Parse cookie
    magic, lengthofPackage, toc, tocLen, pyver, pylibname = struct.unpack('!8siiii64s', cookie_data[:88])
    print(f'Length: {lengthofPackage}, TOC: {toc}, TOC len: {tocLen}')
    
    archive_start = idx + 88 - lengthofPackage
    print(f'Archive start: {archive_start}')
    
    toc_offset = archive_start + toc
    toc_data = data[toc_offset:toc_offset+tocLen]
    
    # Parse TOC entries
    p = 0
    while p < len(toc_data):
        entry_len = struct.unpack('!i', toc_data[p:p+4])[0]
        entry_data = toc_data[p:p+entry_len]
        offset, length, ulen, fmtflag, typecode = struct.unpack('!iiiBB', entry_data[4:4+18])
        name = entry_data[22:entry_len].rstrip(b'\\x00').decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
        print(f'  {name} type={chr(typecode)} offset={offset} len={length}')
        p += entry_len
" 2>&1 | head -60

idx = data.rfind(COOKIE_MAGIC)

# Pyinstaller cookie format:
# 8 byte magic + 4 byte length + 4 byte toc + 4 byte tocLen + 4 byte pyvers + 64 byte pylibname = 88
cookie_data = data[idx:idx+88]
magic, lengthofPackage, toc, tocLen, pyver, pylibname = struct.unpack('!8siiii64s', cookie_data)
print(f'Length: {lengthofPackage}, TOC offset in archive: {toc}, TOC len: {tocLen}')

archive_start = idx + 88 - lengthofPackage
toc_offset = archive_start + toc
toc_data = data[toc_offset:toc_offset+tocLen]

# Entry format: int(4) + offset(4) + length_compressed(4) + length_uncompressed(4) + cmprsdFlag(1) + typcode(1) + name(rest)
p = 0
entries = []
while p < len(toc_data):
    entry_len = struct.unpack('!i', toc_data[p:p+4])[0]
    if entry_len < 18:
        break

import struct
import zlib
import marshal

with open('/tmp/extract/PYZ.pyz', 'rb') as f:
    pyz_data = f.read()

# PYZ format: PYZ\x00 (4) + magic(4) + offset_to_toc(8) + toc(zlib-compressed marshal'd dict)
# Actually for PyInstaller 6.x: PYZ\x00 + 4-byte python magic + 4-byte timestamp + then content

# Try: first 4 bytes PYZ magic, next 4 bytes pyc magic, next 8 bytes offset to TOC
header = pyz_data[:16]
print('Header:', header.hex())

# Find toc offset - typically last 8 bytes? Or maybe at fixed offset?
# Actually PYZ: PYZ\x00 + 4 (pyc magic) + 4 (offset to toc)
# Standard format: 4 bytes 'PYZ\0' + 4 bytes 'magic' + 4 bytes 'reserved' + then TOC location
# Try parsing offset
print('All hex first 32:', pyz_data[:32].hex())

# The TOC is at the end usually
# Let's try unmarshalling from end
# But typically PYZ ends with marshalled TOC

# Actually PYZ format:
# Header (4 bytes): 'PYZ\0'
# Magic (4 bytes): Python magic (a70d0d0a for 3.12)
# Reserved (4 bytes): 0
# Offset of TOC (4 bytes, big-endian): location of the marshalled TOC dict
# ... contents ...
# At offset: marshalled TOC

# Check toc offset
toc_offset = struct.unpack('!I', pyz_data[8:12])[0]
print(f'TOC offset (big-endian): {toc_offset}')

# Try unmarshalling from there
try:
    toc = marshal.loads(pyz_data[toc_offset:])
    print(f'TOC has {len(toc)} entries')
    print('Sample entries:')
    for k in list(toc)[:5]:
        print(f'  {k}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Error: {e}')
EOF

import struct

    pyz_data = f.read()

offset = 249784
length = 6342
mod_data = pyz_data[offset:offset+length]
mod_data = zlib.decompress(mod_data)
code = marshal.loads(mod_data)

# Detail of detect_extra_axioms

        for cc in c.co_consts:
            if isinstance(cc, str):
                print(f'  str: {repr(cc)[:300]}')

        dis.dis(c)
        break

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Try VP!Liveness with HIDE and REVEAL
LEMMA TestLiveHideReveal == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  <1> HIDE DEF VP!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
             SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA TestVP_VPL == VP!Liveness
  BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

LEMMA TestVP_VPL_use == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY TestVP_VPL

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS
