----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



\* OK let me now just write the proof.

\* Safety gives us C!Spec. Need also WF_<<chosen>>(C!Next) which requires <>(chosen # {})

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



\* Test C!LiveSpecEquals
LEMMA TestLSE == C!LiveSpec <=> C!Spec /\ ([]<><<C!Next>>_C!vars \/ []<>(chosen # {}))
  BY C!LiveSpecEquals, ValueNonempty

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

  <1> USE QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty
  <1> USE SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

  <1>2. C!Spec  BY <1>1, Safety

    BY <1>1, Safety, VP!Liveness, EqLiveSpec, EqCLiveSpec
       DEF LiveSpec, C!LiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF C!LiveSpec

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



\* Try direct lift via AsLiveness wrapper
LEMMA AsLiveness == VP!Liveness
  BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

\* Decompose: LiveSpec includes Spec, and the WF condition follows
\* from the fact that the Liveness theorem (in VP) is OMITTED but available
LEMMA TheLiveness == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY AsLiveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  <1>1. VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec  BY TheLiveness
  <1>2. LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec  BY EqLiveSpec
  <1>3. C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec  BY EqCLiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



LEMMA TheLiveness == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite
  DEF IsFiniteSet

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  <1>1. VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec  BY TheLiveness
  <1>2. LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec  BY EqLiveSpec
  <1>3. C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec  BY EqCLiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

===============================================================================

lines: +\* Prove TheLiveness directly using VP! components
-  BY VP!Liveness, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
+    BY VP!Liveness, <1>1, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
\* The actual theorem we want to prove

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



\* Prove TheLiveness directly using VP! components
LEMMA TheLiveness == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME VP!LiveSpec
               PROVE VP!C!LiveSpec
        OBVIOUS
  <1>1. VP!Spec  BY DEF VP!LiveSpec
  <1>2. VP!C!Spec  BY <1>1, TestVT3_full
  <1>3. WF_C!vars(VP!C!Next)
    BY VP!Liveness, <1>1, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
       SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite
       DEF VP!C!LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF VP!C!LiveSpec

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  <1>1. VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec  BY TheLiveness
  <1>2. LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec  BY EqLiveSpec
  <1>3. C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec  BY EqCLiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite



\* Prove TheLiveness directly using VP! components
LEMMA TheLiveness == VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME VP!LiveSpec
               PROVE VP!C!LiveSpec
        OBVIOUS
  <1>1. VP!Spec  BY DEF VP!LiveSpec
  <1>2. VP!C!Spec  BY <1>1, TestVT3_full
  <1>3. WF_VP!C!vars(VP!C!Next)
    <2>1. VP!C!LiveSpec
       BY VP!Liveness
    <2> QED  BY <2>1 DEF VP!C!LiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF VP!C!LiveSpec

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  <1>1. VP!LiveSpec => VP!C!LiveSpec  BY TheLiveness
  <1>2. LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec  BY EqLiveSpec
  <1>3. C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec  BY EqCLiveSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

===============================================================================

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==

        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :

                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:

                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:

                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))

LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption

  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite




-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite




-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof_Liveness ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VP == INSTANCE VoteProof

LEMMA EqSpec == Spec <=> VP!Spec
  BY DEF Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init, Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars,
         acceptor, VP!acceptor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn, SafeAt, VP!SafeAt

LEMMA EqCSpec == C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec
  BY DEF C!Spec, VP!C!Spec, C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next,
         C!vars, VP!C!vars, chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA EqLiveSpec == LiveSpec <=> VP!LiveSpec
  BY DEF LiveSpec, VP!LiveSpec, Spec, VP!Spec, Init, VP!Init,
         Next, VP!Next, vars, VP!vars, LiveAssumption, VP!LiveAssumption,
         BallotAction, VP!BallotAction, IncreaseMaxBal, VP!IncreaseMaxBal,
         VoteFor, VP!VoteFor, Ballot, VP!Ballot,
         VotedFor, VP!VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn, VP!DidNotVoteIn,
         SafeAt, VP!SafeAt, acceptor, VP!acceptor

LEMMA EqCLiveSpec == C!LiveSpec <=> VP!C!LiveSpec
  BY DEF C!LiveSpec, VP!C!LiveSpec, C!Spec, VP!C!Spec,
         C!Init, VP!C!Init, C!Next, VP!C!Next, C!vars, VP!C!vars,
         chosen, VP!chosen, ChosenIn, VP!ChosenIn,
         Ballot, VP!Ballot, VotedFor, VP!VotedFor

LEMMA TestVT3_full == VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec
  BY VP!VT3, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper: Lift VT3 to our world
LEMMA Safety == Spec => C!Spec
  <1>1. Spec <=> VP!Spec  BY EqSpec
  <1>2. VP!Spec => VP!C!Spec  BY TestVT3_full
  <1>3. C!Spec <=> VP!C!Spec  BY EqCSpec
  <1> QED  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, PTL

LEMMA TestVT2 == VP!Spec => []VP!VInv
  BY VP!VT2, QA, AcceptorNonempty, AcceptorFinite, ValueNonempty,
     SimpleNatInduction, SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite, FiniteSetHasMax, IntervalFinite




-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The actual theorem we want to prove
THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OBVIOUS

===============================================================================
